customfield_10020.name: Sprint 5
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
1. Analysis of the Sprint 4 deployment version
2. Standardize Driver App analytics events (GA4 + on-device logging)
3. Driver Pause Check Alert — Authorized stop confirmation

Product and UX/UI
1. Discovery regarding the filters (routes) drivers use in the app

Main deliveries
- Standardize Driver App analytics events (GA4 + on-device logging)
- Driver Pause Check Alert — Authorized stop confirmation


Sprint Constraints
- Developer Patrick will be back on vacation in the middle of sprint 5. (14/07 ~ 20/07)
- Developer Victor will be going on vacation in the final of the sprint 5. (27/07 ~ 31/07)

Risks
We moved a lot of items into the previous sprint (Sprint 4) and are monitoring the situation, but there is no anticipated risk for Sprint 5 itself.

Validations
No validations in this sprint.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 4
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
1. Deliver the MM Phase 3 MVP,
which includes a new photo capture workflow and a driver break alert (feature flag).
2. Deliver the Pickup version (tokens) to Americanas/Abbiamo – deadline is July 15, but delivering it earlier would be a success.
3. Integration and endpoint improvements with the marketplace (Venddor)

Main deliveries
- MM fase 3
- Pickup (token)
- Endpoint Marketplace


Sprint Constraints
- We won't have any public holidays, but we are in the World Cup period. There may be matches or possible breaks.
- Developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5. (08/07 ~ 20/07)

Risks
Deployment-related risks associated with the delivery and tight deadline of MM Phase 3, compounded by numerous interdependencies with other squads.

Validations
Validation with the Amazon team (MM project) on July 8 – We want the MM Phase 3 version launched early to ensure "live" testing.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 3
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Finish developing Phase 1 of the "OTP" and begin developing Phase 3 of the MM (shipper photo log).

Main deliveries
- OTP Validation — Delivery Validation via Code: Implements OTP validation in the pickup stages, with a unified architecture (Lambda + MySQL).
- Middle Mile Phase 3 — Driver's Journey: It covers onboarding of the new process, recording of arrival evidence (arrival at pickup and dropoff), "arrive 10 min early" mode, evidence of loaded vehicle (photo sections categorized and error/recovery statuses per stage.
- Courier API v4 — Endpoint Migration: Continuation of migration to v4: migration of the registration endpoint and progress tracking document. Status: in progress. Important because it forms the basis for other features.

Sprint Constraints
Normal sprint, no holidays and no breaks with the developers.
However, it has already been highlighted that developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5.

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 3.
But it's worth highlighting that in Sprint 4 we will have the delivery of the shipper's photo stream for MM phase 3.

Finish developing Phase 1 of the "OTP" and begin developing Phase 3 of the MM (shipper photo log).

Main deliveries
- OTP Validation — Delivery Validation via Code: Implements OTP validation in the pickup stages, with a unified architecture (Lambda + MySQL).
- Middle Mile Phase 3 — Driver's Journey: It covers onboarding of the new process, recording of arrival evidence (arrival at pickup and dropoff), "arrive 10 min early" mode, evidence of loaded vehicle (photo sections categorized and error/recovery statuses per stage.
- Courier API v4 — Endpoint Migration: Continuation of migration to v4: migration of the registration endpoint and progress tracking document. Status: in progress. Important because it forms the basis for other features.

Sprint Constraints
Normal sprint, no holidays and no breaks with the developers.
However, it has already been highlighted that developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5.

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 3.
But it's worth highlighting that in Sprint 4 we will have the delivery of the shipper's photo stream for MM phase 3.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 4
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
1. Deliver the MM Phase 3 MVP,
which includes a new photo capture workflow and a driver break alert (feature flag).
2. Deliver the Pickup version (tokens) to Americanas/Abbiamo – deadline is July 15, but delivering it earlier would be a success.
3. Integration and endpoint improvements with the marketplace (Venddor)

Main deliveries
- MM fase 3
- Pickup (token)
- Endpoint Marketplace


Sprint Constraints
- We won't have any public holidays, but we are in the World Cup period. There may be matches or possible breaks.
- Developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5. (08/07 ~ 20/07)

Risks
Deployment-related risks associated with the delivery and tight deadline of MM Phase 3, compounded by numerous interdependencies with other squads.

Validations
Validation with the Amazon team (MM project) on July 8 – We want the MM Phase 3 version launched early to ensure "live" testing.

fields.summary: [ProblemReason][QA] Create doc to QA Team of tests

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Bringing OTP validation to the app makes pickup/delivery/return safer without disrupting the delivery person's workflow.
Main deliveries
- OTP screen + gating — code entry screen (6 digits, loading/error, i18n es/en/pt), displayed only when the timeline marks the action as active: true.
- Validation before status change — integration with POST /v3/otp/validate; the status only advances in case of success, with error and retry in case of failure.
- Resend with cooldown + "no code" flow — POST /v3/otp/resend with button blocked during cooldown, and alternative path when the client does not have the code.
- Legacy removal + E2E QA — single path (validate → change status), with regression on dropoff and end-to-end QA in beta.

Sprint Constraints -> June 4th will be a holiday in Brazil.
Risks -> No risks foreseen in this sprint.
Validations -> No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 2.

Finish developing Phase 1 of the "OTP" and begin developing Phase 3 of the MM (shipper photo log).

Main deliveries
- OTP Validation — Delivery Validation via Code: Implements OTP validation in the pickup stages, with a unified architecture (Lambda + MySQL).
- Middle Mile Phase 3 — Driver's Journey: It covers onboarding of the new process, recording of arrival evidence (arrival at pickup and dropoff), "arrive 10 min early" mode, evidence of loaded vehicle (photo sections categorized and error/recovery statuses per stage.
- Courier API v4 — Endpoint Migration: Continuation of migration to v4: migration of the registration endpoint and progress tracking document. Status: in progress. Important because it forms the basis for other features.

Sprint Constraints
Normal sprint, no holidays and no breaks with the developers.
However, it has already been highlighted that developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5.

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 3.
But it's worth highlighting that in Sprint 4 we will have the delivery of the shipper's photo stream for MM phase 3.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 4
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
1. Deliver the MM Phase 3 MVP,
which includes a new photo capture workflow and a driver break alert (feature flag).
2. Deliver the Pickup version (tokens) to Americanas/Abbiamo – deadline is July 15, but delivering it earlier would be a success.
3. Integration and endpoint improvements with the marketplace (Venddor)

Main deliveries
- MM fase 3
- Pickup (token)
- Endpoint Marketplace


Sprint Constraints
- We won't have any public holidays, but we are in the World Cup period. There may be matches or possible breaks.
- Developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5. (08/07 ~ 20/07)

Risks
Deployment-related risks associated with the delivery and tight deadline of MM Phase 3, compounded by numerous interdependencies with other squads.

Validations
Validation with the Amazon team (MM project) on July 8 – We want the MM Phase 3 version launched early to ensure "live" testing.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Bringing OTP validation to the app makes pickup/delivery/return safer without disrupting the delivery person's workflow.
Main deliveries
- OTP screen + gating — code entry screen (6 digits, loading/error, i18n es/en/pt), displayed only when the timeline marks the action as active: true.
- Validation before status change — integration with POST /v3/otp/validate; the status only advances in case of success, with error and retry in case of failure.
- Resend with cooldown + "no code" flow — POST /v3/otp/resend with button blocked during cooldown, and alternative path when the client does not have the code.
- Legacy removal + E2E QA — single path (validate → change status), with regression on dropoff and end-to-end QA in beta.

Sprint Constraints -> June 4th will be a holiday in Brazil.
Risks -> No risks foreseen in this sprint.
Validations -> No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 2.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Bringing OTP validation to the app makes pickup/delivery/return safer without disrupting the delivery person's workflow.
Main deliveries
- OTP screen + gating — code entry screen (6 digits, loading/error, i18n es/en/pt), displayed only when the timeline marks the action as active: true.
- Validation before status change — integration with POST /v3/otp/validate; the status only advances in case of success, with error and retry in case of failure.
- Resend with cooldown + "no code" flow — POST /v3/otp/resend with button blocked during cooldown, and alternative path when the client does not have the code.
- Legacy removal + E2E QA — single path (validate → change status), with regression on dropoff and end-to-end QA in beta.

Sprint Constraints -> June 4th will be a holiday in Brazil.
Risks -> No risks foreseen in this sprint.
Validations -> No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 2.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 1
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Reduce operational risk and improve visibility of Slots

Main deliveries
- Re-enable Save Filters and fix filter persistence and presentation.
- Implement a notification panel for slots without assigned drivers.
- Improvements in Slot Detail: show Slot ID / Coverage ID / Shift ID, fix map fitBounds, and add a legend for driver color states.
- Operational rules and validations: block creation of slots for past shifts, prohibit Zipcode Ranges with slotsEnabled = true, and apply restrictions on edit/move/delete based on slot state and proximity to shift start.

Technical support:
We need to be available for any support team tickets, QA cards, and cards that may come from other squads during this transition period.

Sprint Constraints
May 25th is a holiday for the team that is outside of Brazil. 

Risks
No identified risks related to the Slots project. Monitor for possible intrusions from Middle Mile / Control Tower topics.

Validations
Validate the final delivery with Naiara Domingues and the Operations team, and monitor for potential improvements after release.

fields.summary: [OTP][App] E2E QA - OTP flows on beta

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 3
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Finish developing Phase 1 of the "OTP" and begin developing Phase 3 of the MM (shipper photo log).

Main deliveries
- OTP Validation — Delivery Validation via Code: Implements OTP validation in the pickup stages, with a unified architecture (Lambda + MySQL).
- Middle Mile Phase 3 — Driver's Journey: It covers onboarding of the new process, recording of arrival evidence (arrival at pickup and dropoff), "arrive 10 min early" mode, evidence of loaded vehicle (photo sections categorized and error/recovery statuses per stage.
- Courier API v4 — Endpoint Migration: Continuation of migration to v4: migration of the registration endpoint and progress tracking document. Status: in progress. Important because it forms the basis for other features.

Sprint Constraints
Normal sprint, no holidays and no breaks with the developers.
However, it has already been highlighted that developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5.

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 3.
But it's worth highlighting that in Sprint 4 we will have the delivery of the shipper's photo stream for MM phase 3.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 5
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
1. Analysis of the Sprint 4 deployment version
2. Standardize Driver App analytics events (GA4 + on-device logging)
3. Driver Pause Check Alert — Authorized stop confirmation

Product and UX/UI
1. Discovery regarding the filters (routes) drivers use in the app

Main deliveries
- Standardize Driver App analytics events (GA4 + on-device logging)
- Driver Pause Check Alert — Authorized stop confirmation


Sprint Constraints
- Developer Patrick will be back on vacation in the middle of sprint 5. (14/07 ~ 20/07)
- Developer Victor will be going on vacation in the final of the sprint 5. (27/07 ~ 31/07)

Risks
We moved a lot of items into the previous sprint (Sprint 4) and are monitoring the situation, but there is no anticipated risk for Sprint 5 itself.

Validations
No validations in this sprint.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Bringing OTP validation to the app makes pickup/delivery/return safer without disrupting the delivery person's workflow.
Main deliveries
- OTP screen + gating — code entry screen (6 digits, loading/error, i18n es/en/pt), displayed only when the timeline marks the action as active: true.
- Validation before status change — integration with POST /v3/otp/validate; the status only advances in case of success, with error and retry in case of failure.
- Resend with cooldown + "no code" flow — POST /v3/otp/resend with button blocked during cooldown, and alternative path when the client does not have the code.
- Legacy removal + E2E QA — single path (validate → change status), with regression on dropoff and end-to-end QA in beta.

Sprint Constraints -> June 4th will be a holiday in Brazil.
Risks -> No risks foreseen in this sprint.
Validations -> No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 2.

customfield_10020.goal:

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Bringing OTP validation to the app makes pickup/delivery/return safer without disrupting the delivery person's workflow.
Main deliveries
- OTP screen + gating — code entry screen (6 digits, loading/error, i18n es/en/pt), displayed only when the timeline marks the action as active: true.
- Validation before status change — integration with POST /v3/otp/validate; the status only advances in case of success, with error and retry in case of failure.
- Resend with cooldown + "no code" flow — POST /v3/otp/resend with button blocked during cooldown, and alternative path when the client does not have the code.
- Legacy removal + E2E QA — single path (validate → change status), with regression on dropoff and end-to-end QA in beta.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 1
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Reduce operational risk and improve visibility of Slots

Main deliveries
- Re-enable Save Filters and fix filter persistence and presentation.
- Implement a notification panel for slots without assigned drivers.
- Improvements in Slot Detail: show Slot ID / Coverage ID / Shift ID, fix map fitBounds, and add a legend for driver color states.
- Operational rules and validations: block creation of slots for past shifts, prohibit Zipcode Ranges with slotsEnabled = true, and apply restrictions on edit/move/delete based on slot state and proximity to shift start.

Technical support:
We need to be available for any support team tickets, QA cards, and cards that may come from other squads during this transition period.

Sprint Constraints
May 25th is a holiday for the team that is outside of Brazil. 

Risks
No identified risks related to the Slots project. Monitor for possible intrusions from Middle Mile / Control Tower topics.

Validations
Validate the final delivery with Naiara Domingues and the Operations team, and monitor for potential improvements after release.

- Middle Mile Phase 3 — Driver's Journey: It covers onboarding of the new process, recording of arrival evidence (arrival at pickup and dropoff), "arrive 10 min early" mode, evidence of loaded vehicle (photo sections categorized and error/recovery statuses per stage.
- Courier API v4 — Endpoint Migration: Continuation of migration to v4: migration of the registration endpoint and progress tracking document. Status: in progress. Important because it forms the basis for other features.

- Endpoint Marketplace

fields.summary: [MM3] Error states and recovery by step

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 3
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Finish developing Phase 1 of the "OTP" and begin developing Phase 3 of the MM (shipper photo log).

Main deliveries
- OTP Validation — Delivery Validation via Code: Implements OTP validation in the pickup stages, with a unified architecture (Lambda + MySQL).
- Middle Mile Phase 3 — Driver's Journey: It covers onboarding of the new process, recording of arrival evidence (arrival at pickup and dropoff), "arrive 10 min early" mode, evidence of loaded vehicle (photo sections categorized and error/recovery statuses per stage.
- Courier API v4 — Endpoint Migration: Continuation of migration to v4: migration of the registration endpoint and progress tracking document. Status: in progress. Important because it forms the basis for other features.

Sprint Constraints
Normal sprint, no holidays and no breaks with the developers.
However, it has already been highlighted that developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5.

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 3.
But it's worth highlighting that in Sprint 4 we will have the delivery of the shipper's photo stream for MM phase 3.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 5
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
1. Analysis of the Sprint 4 deployment version
2. Standardize Driver App analytics events (GA4 + on-device logging)
3. Driver Pause Check Alert — Authorized stop confirmation

Product and UX/UI
1. Discovery regarding the filters (routes) drivers use in the app

Main deliveries
- Standardize Driver App analytics events (GA4 + on-device logging)
- Driver Pause Check Alert — Authorized stop confirmation


Sprint Constraints
- Developer Patrick will be back on vacation in the middle of sprint 5. (14/07 ~ 20/07)
- Developer Victor will be going on vacation in the final of the sprint 5. (27/07 ~ 31/07)

Risks
We moved a lot of items into the previous sprint (Sprint 4) and are monitoring the situation, but there is no anticipated risk for Sprint 5 itself.

Validations
No validations in this sprint.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 4
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
1. Deliver the MM Phase 3 MVP,
which includes a new photo capture workflow and a driver break alert (feature flag).
2. Deliver the Pickup version (tokens) to Americanas/Abbiamo – deadline is July 15, but delivering it earlier would be a success.
3. Integration and endpoint improvements with the marketplace (Venddor)

Main deliveries
- MM fase 3
- Pickup (token)
- Endpoint Marketplace


Sprint Constraints
- We won't have any public holidays, but we are in the World Cup period. There may be matches or possible breaks.
- Developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5. (08/07 ~ 20/07)

Risks
Deployment-related risks associated with the delivery and tight deadline of MM Phase 3, compounded by numerous interdependencies with other squads.

Validations
Validation with the Amazon team (MM project) on July 8 – We want the MM Phase 3 version launched early to ensure "live" testing.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 1
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Reduce operational risk and improve visibility of Slots

Main deliveries
- Re-enable Save Filters and fix filter persistence and presentation.
- Implement a notification panel for slots without assigned drivers.
- Improvements in Slot Detail: show Slot ID / Coverage ID / Shift ID, fix map fitBounds, and add a legend for driver color states.
- Operational rules and validations: block creation of slots for past shifts, prohibit Zipcode Ranges with slotsEnabled = true, and apply restrictions on edit/move/delete based on slot state and proximity to shift start.

Technical support:
We need to be available for any support team tickets, QA cards, and cards that may come from other squads during this transition period.

Sprint Constraints
May 25th is a holiday for the team that is outside of Brazil. 

Risks
No identified risks related to the Slots project. Monitor for possible intrusions from Middle Mile / Control Tower topics.

Validations
Validate the final delivery with Naiara Domingues and the Operations team, and monitor for potential improvements after release.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Bringing OTP validation to the app makes pickup/delivery/return safer without disrupting the delivery person's workflow.
Main deliveries
- OTP screen + gating — code entry screen (6 digits, loading/error, i18n es/en/pt), displayed only when the timeline marks the action as active: true.
- Validation before status change — integration with POST /v3/otp/validate; the status only advances in case of success, with error and retry in case of failure.
- Resend with cooldown + "no code" flow — POST /v3/otp/resend with button blocked during cooldown, and alternative path when the client does not have the code.
- Legacy removal + E2E QA — single path (validate → change status), with regression on dropoff and end-to-end QA in beta.

Sprint Constraints -> June 4th will be a holiday in Brazil.
Risks -> No risks foreseen in this sprint.
Validations -> No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 2.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 1
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Reduce operational risk and improve visibility of Slots

Main deliveries
- Re-enable Save Filters and fix filter persistence and presentation.
- Implement a notification panel for slots without assigned drivers.
- Improvements in Slot Detail: show Slot ID / Coverage ID / Shift ID, fix map fitBounds, and add a legend for driver color states.
- Operational rules and validations: block creation of slots for past shifts, prohibit Zipcode Ranges with slotsEnabled = true, and apply restrictions on edit/move/delete based on slot state and proximity to shift start.

Technical support:
We need to be available for any support team tickets, QA cards, and cards that may come from other squads during this transition period.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Bringing OTP validation to the app makes pickup/delivery/return safer without disrupting the delivery person's workflow.
Main deliveries
- OTP screen + gating — code entry screen (6 digits, loading/error, i18n es/en/pt), displayed only when the timeline marks the action as active: true.
- Validation before status change — integration with POST /v3/otp/validate; the status only advances in case of success, with error and retry in case of failure.
- Resend with cooldown + "no code" flow — POST /v3/otp/resend with button blocked during cooldown, and alternative path when the client does not have the code.
- Legacy removal + E2E QA — single path (validate → change status), with regression on dropoff and end-to-end QA in beta.

Sprint Constraints -> June 4th will be a holiday in Brazil.
Risks -> No risks foreseen in this sprint.
Validations -> No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 2.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 1
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Reduce operational risk and improve visibility of Slots

Main deliveries
- Re-enable Save Filters and fix filter persistence and presentation.
- Implement a notification panel for slots without assigned drivers.
- Improvements in Slot Detail: show Slot ID / Coverage ID / Shift ID, fix map fitBounds, and add a legend for driver color states.
- Operational rules and validations: block creation of slots for past shifts, prohibit Zipcode Ranges with slotsEnabled = true, and apply restrictions on edit/move/delete based on slot state and proximity to shift start.

Technical support:
We need to be available for any support team tickets, QA cards, and cards that may come from other squads during this transition period.

Sprint Constraints
May 25th is a holiday for the team that is outside of Brazil. 

Risks
No identified risks related to the Slots project. Monitor for possible intrusions from Middle Mile / Control Tower topics.

Validations
Validate the final delivery with Naiara Domingues and the Operations team, and monitor for potential improvements after release.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Bringing OTP validation to the app makes pickup/delivery/return safer without disrupting the delivery person's workflow.
Main deliveries
- OTP screen + gating — code entry screen (6 digits, loading/error, i18n es/en/pt), displayed only when the timeline marks the action as active: true.
- Validation before status change — integration with POST /v3/otp/validate; the status only advances in case of success, with error and retry in case of failure.
- Resend with cooldown + "no code" flow — POST /v3/otp/resend with button blocked during cooldown, and alternative path when the client does not have the code.
- Legacy removal + E2E QA — single path (validate → change status), with regression on dropoff and end-to-end QA in beta.

Sprint Constraints -> June 4th will be a holiday in Brazil.
Risks -> No risks foreseen in this sprint.
Validations -> No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 2.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 3
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Finish developing Phase 1 of the "OTP" and begin developing Phase 3 of the MM (shipper photo log).

Main deliveries
- OTP Validation — Delivery Validation via Code: Implements OTP validation in the pickup stages, with a unified architecture (Lambda + MySQL).
- Middle Mile Phase 3 — Driver's Journey: It covers onboarding of the new process, recording of arrival evidence (arrival at pickup and dropoff), "arrive 10 min early" mode, evidence of loaded vehicle (photo sections categorized and error/recovery statuses per stage.
- Courier API v4 — Endpoint Migration: Continuation of migration to v4: migration of the registration endpoint and progress tracking document. Status: in progress. Important because it forms the basis for other features.

Sprint Constraints
Normal sprint, no holidays and no breaks with the developers.
However, it has already been highlighted that developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5.

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 3.
But it's worth highlighting that in Sprint 4 we will have the delivery of the shipper's photo stream for MM phase 3.

customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Strengthen app foundations, improve observability, and reduce release risk.

Main deliveries
- Courier API v4 migration foundation with Clean Architecture and Cognito setup.
- Homepage Admin improvements with preview before save and beta environment validation.
- Automated integration tests for login and registration flows.

Technical support:
We need to be available for any support team tickets, QA cards, and cards that may come from other squads during this transition period.

Sprint Constraints
May 25th is a holiday for the team that is outside of Brazil. 

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
Validations are only for technical deliverables. They do not directly affect the user experience.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 1
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Reduce operational risk and improve visibility of Slots

Main deliveries
- Re-enable Save Filters and fix filter persistence and presentation.
- Implement a notification panel for slots without assigned drivers.
- Improvements in Slot Detail: show Slot ID / Coverage ID / Shift ID, fix map fitBounds, and add a legend for driver color states.
- Operational rules and validations: block creation of slots for past shifts, prohibit Zipcode Ranges with slotsEnabled = true, and apply restrictions on edit/move/delete based on slot state and proximity to shift start.

Technical support:
We need to be available for any support team tickets, QA cards, and cards that may come from other squads during this transition period.

Sprint Constraints
May 25th is a holiday for the team that is outside of Brazil. 

Risks
No identified risks related to the Slots project. Monitor for possible intrusions from Middle Mile / Control Tower topics.

Validations
Validate the final delivery with Naiara Domingues and the Operations team, and monitor for potential improvements after release.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 5
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
1. Analysis of the Sprint 4 deployment version
2. Standardize Driver App analytics events (GA4 + on-device logging)
3. Driver Pause Check Alert — Authorized stop confirmation

Product and UX/UI
1. Discovery regarding the filters (routes) drivers use in the app

Main deliveries
- Standardize Driver App analytics events (GA4 + on-device logging)
- Driver Pause Check Alert — Authorized stop confirmation


Sprint Constraints
- Developer Patrick will be back on vacation in the middle of sprint 5. (14/07 ~ 20/07)
- Developer Victor will be going on vacation in the final of the sprint 5. (27/07 ~ 31/07)

Risks
We moved a lot of items into the previous sprint (Sprint 4) and are monitoring the situation, but there is no anticipated risk for Sprint 5 itself.

Validations
No validations in this sprint.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 4
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
1. Deliver the MM Phase 3 MVP,
which includes a new photo capture workflow and a driver break alert (feature flag).
2. Deliver the Pickup version (tokens) to Americanas/Abbiamo – deadline is July 15, but delivering it earlier would be a success.
3. Integration and endpoint improvements with the marketplace (Venddor)

Main deliveries
- MM fase 3
- Pickup (token)
- Endpoint Marketplace


Sprint Constraints
- We won't have any public holidays, but we are in the World Cup period. There may be matches or possible breaks.
- Developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5. (08/07 ~ 20/07)

Risks
Deployment-related risks associated with the delivery and tight deadline of MM Phase 3, compounded by numerous interdependencies with other squads.

Validations
Validation with the Amazon team (MM project) on July 8 – We want the MM Phase 3 version launched early to ensure "live" testing.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Bringing OTP validation to the app makes pickup/delivery/return safer without disrupting the delivery person's workflow.
Main deliveries
- OTP screen + gating — code entry screen (6 digits, loading/error, i18n es/en/pt), displayed only when the timeline marks the action as active: true.
- Validation before status change — integration with POST /v3/otp/validate; the status only advances in case of success, with error and retry in case of failure.
- Resend with cooldown + "no code" flow — POST /v3/otp/resend with button blocked during cooldown, and alternative path when the client does not have the code.
- Legacy removal + E2E QA — single path (validate → change status), with regression on dropoff and end-to-end QA in beta.

Sprint Constraints -> June 4th will be a holiday in Brazil.
Risks -> No risks foreseen in this sprint.
Validations -> No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 2.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 3
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Finish developing Phase 1 of the "OTP" and begin developing Phase 3 of the MM (shipper photo log).

Main deliveries
- OTP Validation — Delivery Validation via Code: Implements OTP validation in the pickup stages, with a unified architecture (Lambda + MySQL).
- Middle Mile Phase 3 — Driver's Journey: It covers onboarding of the new process, recording of arrival evidence (arrival at pickup and dropoff), "arrive 10 min early" mode, evidence of loaded vehicle (photo sections categorized and error/recovery statuses per stage.
- Courier API v4 — Endpoint Migration: Continuation of migration to v4: migration of the registration endpoint and progress tracking document. Status: in progress. Important because it forms the basis for other features.

Sprint Constraints
Normal sprint, no holidays and no breaks with the developers.
However, it has already been highlighted that developer Patrick will be going on vacation in the middle of sprint 4, returning halfway through sprint 5.

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 3.
But it's worth highlighting that in Sprint 4 we will have the delivery of the shipper's photo stream for MM phase 3.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Standardize the dashboard on shared platform components and bring real-time visibility to the Smart Notification driver-rotation process.

Main deliveries
- Real-time visibility of Smart Notifications — propagate data to Firebase (userId, slotId/deliverySlotId, round), extend the RealTimeProgress widget to the smart notification collection, display jobs in the Slots header, and redesign the card in Route Detail.
- Standardization of Slots in shared components — replace proprietary implementations with platform standards: RealTimeProgress instead of  JobsBadge, Dialogs.GenerateReport instead of SlotReportDialog, and the official push microfrontend instead of PushNotificationsDialog.
- Migration of the Companies page to React — wiring of the route/bundle, table with server-side pagination, and search bar with debounce, moving away from EJS/jQuery.

Sprint Constraints
June 4th will be a holiday in Brazil.

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 2.

Beginning of MM phase 3 development. Remember that we are reusing the current layout to deliver it on time for July 8th.

Main deliveries
- Operational Dashboard (MM F3) — alert visibility: Highlight tasks with alerts in Dash/Monitor: UX design for alerts (color coding + dashboard per deliverable)
- Deliverables currently in PR Review / QA:
a) Smart Notifications + Monitor
b) React Version Upgrade
c) Companies — Migration to React
d) Slots — Improvements & UI/UX Fixes

Sprint Constraints
Normal sprint, no holidays and no breaks with the developers

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 3.

fields.summary: [Bug] It's not showing all history changes on slots events tab (OE-10 Slots)

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Standardize the dashboard on shared platform components and bring real-time visibility to the Smart Notification driver-rotation process.

Main deliveries
- Real-time visibility of Smart Notifications — propagate data to Firebase (userId, slotId/deliverySlotId, round), extend the RealTimeProgress widget to the smart notification collection, display jobs in the Slots header, and redesign the card in Route Detail.
- Standardization of Slots in shared components — replace proprietary implementations with platform standards: RealTimeProgress instead of  JobsBadge, Dialogs.GenerateReport instead of SlotReportDialog, and the official push microfrontend instead of PushNotificationsDialog.
- Migration of the Companies page to React — wiring of the route/bundle, table with server-side pagination, and search bar with debounce, moving away from EJS/jQuery.

Sprint Constraints
June 4th will be a holiday in Brazil.

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 2.

fields.summary: [Sprint 1] Assisting the new intern during the onboarding process

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 1
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Reduce operational risk and improve visibility of Slots

Main deliveries
- Re-enable Save Filters and fix filter persistence and presentation.
- Implement a notification panel for slots without assigned drivers.
- Improvements in Slot Detail: show Slot ID / Coverage ID / Shift ID, fix map fitBounds, and add a legend for driver color states.
- Operational rules and validations: block creation of slots for past shifts, prohibit Zipcode Ranges with slotsEnabled = true, and apply restrictions on edit/move/delete based on slot state and proximity to shift start.

Technical support:
We need to be available for any support team tickets, QA cards, and cards that may come from other squads during this transition period.

Sprint Constraints
May 25th is a holiday for the team that is outside of Brazil. 

Risks
No identified risks related to the Slots project. Monitor for possible intrusions from Middle Mile / Control Tower topics.

Validations
Validate the final delivery with Naiara Domingues and the Operations team, and monitor for potential improvements after release.

- Improvements in Slot Detail: show Slot ID / Coverage ID / Shift ID, fix map fitBounds, and add a legend for driver color states.
- Operational rules and validations: block creation of slots for past shifts, prohibit Zipcode Ranges with slotsEnabled = true, and apply restrictions on edit/move/delete based on slot state and proximity to shift start.

Technical support:
We need to be available for any support team tickets, QA cards, and cards that may come from other squads during this transition period.

Sprint Constraints
May 25th is a holiday for the team that is outside of Brazil.

No identified risks related to the Slots project. Monitor for possible intrusions from Middle Mile / Control Tower topics.

customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Reduce operational risk and improve visibility of Slots

Main deliveries
- Re-enable Save Filters and fix filter persistence and presentation.
- Implement a notification panel for slots without assigned drivers.
- Improvements in Slot Detail: show Slot ID / Coverage ID / Shift ID, fix map fitBounds, and add a legend for driver color states.
- Operational rules and validations: block creation of slots for past shifts, prohibit Zipcode Ranges with slotsEnabled = true, and apply restrictions on edit/move/delete based on slot state and proximity to shift start.

Technical support:
We need to be available for any support team tickets, QA cards, and cards that may come from other squads during this transition period.

Sprint Constraints
May 25th is a holiday for the team that is outside of Brazil. 

Risks
No identified risks related to the Slots project. Monitor for possible intrusions from Middle Mile / Control Tower topics.

Validations
Validate the final delivery with Naiara Domingues and the Operations team, and monitor for potential improvements after release.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 2
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
- Standardize the dashboard on shared platform components and bring real-time visibility to the Smart Notification driver-rotation process.

Main deliveries
- Real-time visibility of Smart Notifications — propagate data to Firebase (userId, slotId/deliverySlotId, round), extend the RealTimeProgress widget to the smart notification collection, display jobs in the Slots header, and redesign the card in Route Detail.
- Standardization of Slots in shared components — replace proprietary implementations with platform standards: RealTimeProgress instead of  JobsBadge, Dialogs.GenerateReport instead of SlotReportDialog, and the official push microfrontend instead of PushNotificationsDialog.
- Migration of the Companies page to React — wiring of the route/bundle, table with server-side pagination, and search bar with debounce, moving away from EJS/jQuery.

Sprint Constraints
June 4th will be a holiday in Brazil.

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 2.

customfield_10020.name: Sprint 3
customfield_10020.goal:
Sprint Goal
Beginning of MM phase 3 development. Remember that we are reusing the current layout to deliver it on time for July 8th.

Main deliveries
- Operational Dashboard (MM F3) — alert visibility: Highlight tasks with alerts in Dash/Monitor: UX design for alerts (color coding + dashboard per deliverable)
- Deliverables currently in PR Review / QA:
a) Smart Notifications + Monitor
b) React Version Upgrade
c) Companies — Migration to React
d) Slots — Improvements & UI/UX Fixes

Sprint Constraints
Normal sprint, no holidays and no breaks with the developers

Risks
No risks foreseen in this sprint.

Validations
No stakeholder validation occurred during sprint 3.
